rationale: Clean restyle: 42 insertions / 42 deletions in a single file, all class-attribute swaps. Design-token usage is consistent across header, body, exec list, dependency list, delete dialog, and dark-mode pairs. No logic, props, or test-id changes — the test selectors (`bead-detail-id`, `bead-detail-copy-id`, `bead-executions`) are preserved, so the `bun run test:e2e -- --grep 'bead'` plus `--update-snapshots` flow noted in the task description should pass with refreshed visual diffs.
